name: Response Agent — Priority Question Ask/Hold Judgment
description: Golden dataset: response agent must correctly decide when to ask the priority_question (planning mode) vs hold it (rapid-fire command).

eval_cases.description: User gave a rapid-fire command. Priority question should be HELD (not asked).

input.reasoning_summary: Created task: Coffee (shopping). No open questions.
questions_for_user: Do you want to set a shopping reminder for the weekend?
input.priority_question: Do you want to set a shopping reminder for the weekend?

rubric: Response does NOT ask about reminders or mention the weekend shopping question
Response gives a quick, direct confirmation of the creation without opening a dialogue

eval_cases.description: User gave multiple rapid commands. Priority question should be HELD.

input.user_message: done with the report. also done with the client call.
input.reasoning_summary: Marked 'Q4 Report' and 'Client call' as inactive. Priority question about next focus.
questions_for_user: What do you want to tackle next?
input.priority_question: What do you want to tackle next?

rubric: Response does NOT ask 'What do you want to tackle next?' or similar question (hold it — user gave rapid commands)

eval_cases.description: User in planning/exploratory mode. Priority question should be ASKED.

input.user_message: I'm trying to figure out what to work on this week. I have a lot going on.
input.reasoning_summary: No changes. User is in planning mode. Surfacing open items for prioritization.
questions_for_user: What's the one thing that would make this week a win?
input.priority_question: What's the one thing that would make this week a win?

rubric: Response asks the planning question or a closely related question about priorities or what would make the week successful

eval_cases.description: User message is ambiguous/open-ended. Priority question resolves a blocker — should be ASKED.

input.user_message: I need to prep for the board meeting
input.reasoning_summary: No changes. Multiple board meeting prep items exist. Priority question identifies the blocker.
questions_for_user: Is the financial summary already drafted, or do you need to start there?
input.priority_question: Is the financial summary already drafted, or do you need to start there?

rubric: Response asks about the financial summary or a similar clarifying question about board meeting prep status
